form.formComment: Drawn the inside alley. Most recent effort finished 4th on March 24 over 388m at this track behind Speed Dial beaten 8 lengths (23.19) in a Grade 5. Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 4 over 400m at The Gardens behind Physicality beaten 7 lengths (23.69) in a Grade 5. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a eighth over 388m at this track. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when third behind Physicality at The Gardens last start over 400m (23.20). Right in the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels in the back straight.

form.formComment: A speedy beginner who steps up to 388m for the first time. Last appeared when fifth over 272m at The Gardens a week-and-a-half ago. Likely to find this too tough.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. Last start finished fifth over 388m at this track, beaten 8 lengths. Hard to recommend this time.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 388m at this track. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at his last couple of starts, most recently at The Gardens over 400m. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on April 4 over 400m at The Gardens behind Physicality beaten 21 lengths (24.69). Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on April 4 over 400m at The Gardens behind Physicality beaten 21 lengths (24.69). Should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped repeatedly along the home straight and lost momentum.
Galloped on rounding the turn into the back straight.
Heels galloped on and lost ground rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 4 over 400m at The Gardens behind Physicality beaten 1.75 lengths (23.30). Has been around the mark at her last couple and should make her presence felt.
